## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Minimal Reproduction
Please provide a minimal NML example that reproduces the issue:

```nml
// Your minimal NML code here
```

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Create a file with the content above
2. Run `nml dev` or `nml build`
3. See error

## Error Messages
Include any error messages or stack traces:

```
Paste error messages here
```

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Linux]
- Node/Bun version: [e.g. Bun 1.0.0]
- NML version: [e.g. @nml-lang/compiler-ts@2.2.1]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Playground Link
If applicable, provide a link to the NML playground demonstrating the issue:
https://nml-playground.pages.dev
